Package io.cloudstub.s3

Class S3VirtualHostStyleInterceptor

java.lang.Object
io.cloudstub.s3.S3VirtualHostStyleInterceptor
All Implemented Interfaces:
software.amazon.awssdk.core.interceptor.ExecutionInterceptor
public final class S3VirtualHostStyleInterceptor extends Object implements software.amazon.awssdk.core.interceptor.ExecutionInterceptor
AWS SDK v2 ExecutionInterceptor that prepends the bucket to the request path when a default-configured (virtual-hosted-style) S3Client talks to a CloudStub endpoint, so CloudStub's path-style (/{bucket}/{key}) stubs match without pathStyleAccessEnabled.

Acts only on requests to a loopback host (localhost, *.localhost, 127.0.0.1, ::1), leaving a real S3 client in the same JVM untouched. Path-style requests already carry the bucket in the resolved endpoint path and are left unchanged.

Discovered automatically from software/amazon/awssdk/global/handlers/execution.interceptors.
